name: Pineapple Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Purchase the largest pineapple available for more fruit yield. Choose a pineapple with yellow to golden orange color, avoiding any greenish hues, bruises, discolored areas, soft spots, or dried brown leaves.
2. Slice the pineapple and combine it with vodka in a jar. Allow steeping for one week.
3. Strain the mixture and squeeze out as much juice from the pineapple as possible. Filter the liquid several times to ensure smoothness and remove any pulp.
4. Add sugar syrup to taste. Additional pineapple juice can be added if desired.
5. Age the liqueur for one month before serving.
